name: sentinel
description: A self-hostable verifying LLM gateway — routes, semantically caches, and verifies every LLM call.

scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('e2e suite lands in ROADMAP Phase 6')"
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('dev server lands in ROADMAP Phase 1')"
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:cov
scripts.ollama:pull: ollama pull qwen2.5:7b && ollama pull nomic-embed-text
